title: Grid Architecture Exception Registry
description: Documentation schema for grid-architecture-exceptions.json. The authoritative validator lives inside grid-architecture.contract.test.ts (hand-rolled, no JSON-schema runtime dependency). Codex thread 019e7f8f (cross-AI plan-time consensus, 2026-05-31).

path.description: Repo-relative path of the file granted the exception. Must start with 'apps/' and end with .ts or .tsx. Wildcards forbidden.

kind.description: Which restricted specifier the exception covers. direct-ag-grid = `from 'ag-grid-react'`; direct-x-data-grid = `from '@mfe/x-data-grid'`.

reason.description: Free-text justification (>= 20 chars) explaining why the canonical GridShell + ColumnMeta contract is insufficient for this file.

owner.description: GitHub @user or @org/team that owns the exception's lifecycle. Must resolve in this repo's CODEOWNERS / membership; fictional handles fail review.

expiresAt.description: ISO YYYY-MM-DD when the exception expires. Past dates fail the contract test — the owner must either re-justify with a new entry, migrate to the canonical contract, or remove the offending import.
